name: Outis; New Employment (Limbus Company)
description:
Outis barely gaze the paperwork a cursory glance. It was all the same to her. Outis's pen glided across the paper, another contact accepted that she would personally take part in.

She accidentally knocked over a stack of papers, she cursed to herself. Outis swiped the papers off the ground, organizing them. Then something caught her eye. New employment papers.
creator: RPKAppreciator
